programme.desc: The muscular Hercules performs his labors, sails with the Argonauts, and romances the fair Iole.

programme.title: Kill And Kill Again
programme.desc: When Dr. Horatio Kane is kidnapped and is forced to create an army of martial artists his daughter Kandy Kane is the only one who can help. She enlists the help of Steve Chase to save her father and the day.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of the President
programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.desc: Bruce Lee's first chop-socky movie (made in Hong Kong) is action-filled and violent.

programme.title: CLASS OF 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: BEN 10 S1
programme.desc: During a stop at the superstore Shoppë, Ben and Gwen are transformed into babies by nanny-gone-nuts Nanny Nightmare, who will stop at nothing to reshape the world in the image of her day care.

programme.title: BEN 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: BEN 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: BEN 10 S1

programme.title: BEN 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'Stinkfly'.

programme.title: BEN 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads. But a malfunctioning Omnitrix, firing out a mishmash of aliens, may not be the forecast for success.

programme.title: BEN 10 S1

programme.title: BEN 10 S1

programme.title: BEN 10 S1

programme.title: BEN 10 S1
